mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member( member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_phone, member_role_type, default_delivery_address_idx, member_status ) VALUES ( #{memberEmail}, #{memberPassword}, #{memberNickname}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberRoleType}, NULL, 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET member_email = #{memberEmail}, member_password = #{memberPassword}, member_nickname = #{memberNickname}, member_phone = #{memberPhone}, member_role_type = #{memberRoleType}, default_delivery_address_idx = #{defaultDeliveryAddressIdx}, WHERE member_idx = #{memberIdx}
